name: Shells
tooltip: <D>> Dominant foundation specific, activates after killing an enemy:</>
<D>BISON</>
<F1>> Combat Focus: </><C>50%</> increased weapon accuracy and <C>25%</> increased speed and dexterity for <C>5 s</> on receiving direct vitals damage, <C>10 s</> cooldown
<F2>> Flow State: </>Core activates without cost for <C>2.5 s</> on performing a wall dive or flip within <C>1 s</> of starting a climb, <C>20 s</> cooldown
<F3>> Locked In: </>Melee and firearm damage gains <C>0-50%</> defense bypass proportional to remaining vitals, from <C>100-25%</>
<D>DRAGON</>
<F1>> Thermal Transfer: </><C>50%</> of defense gained from Backdraft and Ground Slam, and <C>50%</> of damage received from Burn and explosives is restored to vitals
<F2>> Superheated: </>Backdraft and Ground Slam gain <C>25%</> increased damage and range. Backdraft, Ground Slam and backup weapon damage applies Burn+
<F3>> Crossfeed: </>Aerial maneuvers and hover no longer drain aux power or consume charges for <C>5 s</> on receiving chemical heal
<D>GHOST</>

<F1>> Safety Measures: </>Gain <C>50</> temporary defense during Opportunity, <C>50%</> reduced explosive damage received while camouflage active, debuffs cleared on camouflage activation, <C>15 s</> cooldown

<F2>> Hidden Asset: </>Gain improved camouflage while Amplify active, reduces Tactical Camouflage cooldown by <C>1 s</>, Nano-wire use and throwing devices no longer deactivates camouflage, create a trail of up to <C>5</> Tempest clouds and gain Shroud on Core activation

<F3>> Interference: </>Increases Opportunity duration by <C>1 s</>, firearm and backup weapon kills while Opportunity is active refresh its duration and apply <C>4 s</> Desync+ to enemies within <C>25 m</> of target
<D>HYDRA</>
<F1>> Overstimulated: </>Gain an Adrenal Feedback stack and restore <C>25</> vitals every <C>20 s</>, increases maximum stacks by <C>5</>

<F2>> Feedback Loop: </>Reaching <C>5</> Adrenal Feedback stacks fully charges Core while inactive, stacks no longer reset and gain <C>1</> stack on Core activation, visible enemy kills during active Core consume a stack to increase its duration by up to <C>5 s</>, Core speed by <C>10%</> and restore <C>25</> vitals and max vitals, stacks reset on Core deactivation

<F3>> Post-Kill Clarity: </>Gain Amplify and firearms and backup weapons bypass all damage reductions for <C>5 s</> on kill, Amplify enhances vision and displays all enemies on radar, duration extended while dealing damage, <C>15 s</> cooldown
<D>RHINO</>
<F1>> Force Trauma: </>Shockwave gains <C>50%</> increased range, debuff duration and knockback force, applies Disable+ and Snare+

<F2>> Power Relay: </><C>30 /s</> defense, max defense and aux power regeneration while Disabled or Nano-wire connected and gain <C>5%</> additional Core speed for each unobstructed enemy or ally within <C>15 m</> while Core active

<F3>> Reverberate: </>Backup weapon damage applies Disable for <C>2 s</> and deals <C>0-25%</> additional shock damage proportional to remaining defense, from <C>0-50%</>. Overcharge for <C>5 s</> on firearm or backup weapon kill within <C>4 m</>
